input.niche: AI automation systems and productized implementation support
input.targetAudience: Lean teams, founders, and operators who want more leverage from automation without hiring a large internal systems team
input.offer: Automation design, implementation sprints, and ongoing system optimization
input.goals: Drive traffic to the website, generate discovery calls, and turn social content into proof of capability for productized services and SaaS offers
input.primaryCta: Visit the site to book a systems call
input.keyThemes: Automation workflows, before-and-after efficiency gains, service proof, product walkthroughs, traffic-driving hooks
input.extraContext: This preset should work well later for RelayWorks-style products and services. Prioritize content that can move someone from social into a website visit or demo request.

summary.positioning: RelayWorks Studio is positioned as the ai automation systems and productized implementation brand for lean teams founders and operators, using automation design implementation sprints and ongoing system optimization and…
summary.narrative: This month balances authority, education, offer clarity, and conversion-focused storytelling so every post reinforces sharp, modern, and commercially useful while building momentum around automation workflows, before-and-after efficiency gains. The preset bias stays tuned to saas / productized service content patterns…
